Name: go_game_piece_black
LuaScript:
function onLoad()
    local params = {
        input_function = "onInput",
        function_owner = self,
        label = "URL",
        position = {0, 1.91, 0},
        rotation = {0, 180, 0},
        width = 13000,
        height = 480,
        font_size = 420,
        value = "This is not a sponsor! I'm helping out a friend! > patreon.com/c/Hutber/",
        tooltip = "Click, then Ctrl+C to copy!",
        color = {0, 0.184, 0.263, 1},
        font_color = {1, 1, 1}
    }
    self.createInput(params)
end

function onInput(self, ply, text, selected) end
